tasks.label: Build Max Debug
tasks.command: rm -rf '${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/Max.app' && xcodebuild -project Max.xcodeproj -scheme Max -configuration Debug build CONFIGURATION_BUILD_DIR='${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug' CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO DEVELOPMENT_TEAM= && find '${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/Max.app/Contents/Frameworks' -path '*/Headers' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + && find '${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/Max.app/Contents/Frameworks' -name 'Headers' -type l -delete && codesign --force --deep --sign - '${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/Max.app' && codesign --verify --deep --strict --verbose=2 '${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/Max.app'
